treatment_information.treatment_response: Uneventful surgery and postoperative course; no visual fixation responses or nystagmus developed

treatment_information.dosage_or_details: Used for 4 to 12 weeks after lensectomy
treatment_information.treatment_response: Raised intraocular pressure settled with medication, cessation of topical steroid, or time

treatment_information.dosage_or_details: Performed in one eye where intraocular pressure failed to settle

treatment_timeline.event: Absence of red reflex noted at birth
Referral to eye clinic for absence of red reflex
Contact lenses fitted in each eye
Raised intraocular pressure noted after lensectomy
Seton insertion performed in one eye

patient_outcome.final_status: Severely delayed developmentally with light perception vision in each eye
patient_outcome.complications: Raised intraocular pressure after lensectomy, developmental delay, microcephaly, spasticity
patient_outcome.long_term_prognosis: Severe global developmental delay and microcephaly
